lineup_source: Switzerland vs Bosnia & Herzegovina, Group B, 18 June 2026 (4-3-3)

players.name: Gregor Kobel
players.note: Born in Zürich. No parental origin documented; Swiss surname, assumed Swiss (low confidence).

players.name: Silvan Widmer
players.note: Born in Wettingen. No parental origin documented; Swiss surname, assumed Swiss (low confidence).

players.name: Nico Elvedi
players.note: Born in Zürich; son of Adrian Elvedi, twin brother Jan also a footballer. No parental origin documented; Swiss/Romansh surname, assumed Swiss (low confidence).

players.name: Manuel Akanji
players.note: Wikipedia: 'born in Neftenbach, Switzerland, to a Swiss mother and a Nigerian father.'

players.name: Ricardo Rodríguez
players.note: Born in Zürich to a Spanish father and a Chilean mother; holds Spanish and Chilean nationalities.

players.name: Michel Aebischer
players.note: Born in Fribourg. No parental origin documented; Swiss surname, assumed Swiss (low confidence).

players.name: Granit Xhaka
players.note: Born in Basel to an ethnic Albanian family from Besianë, Kosovo; parents Ragip and Elmaze Xhaka arrived in Basel from Kosovo in 1990.

players.name: Remo Freuler
players.note: Born in Ennenda. 'Of German descent through his mother, who is from Bavaria.' Father's origin not documented; Swiss surname, assumed Swiss (low confidence).

players.name: Fabian Rieder
players.note: Born in Koppigen. No parental origin documented; Swiss surname, assumed Swiss (low confidence).

players.name: Breel Embolo
players.note: Born in Yaoundé, Cameroon; both parents (Moise Kegni, Germaine Embolo) Cameroonian. Moved via France to Switzerland as a child; gained Swiss citizenship through stepfather.

players.name: Dan Ndoye
players.note: Born in Nyon to a Swiss mother and a Senegalese-French father.
